SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST ARNE J. NELSON, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-16-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-01-2009. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LOIS JONES, CSR# 3689. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
